name: API Development Team
description: Design, build, test, and document production-grade APIs

responsibilities: Design error handling and pagination patterns
Write contract tests and integration tests
Validate API behavior against OpenAPI spec
Load test endpoints for performance baselines
Validate input sanitization and rate limiting
Check for OWASP API Security Top 10 issues

use_cases: Building new REST or GraphQL APIs

handoffs.gate: Schema validates with no errors; all endpoints defined
Authentication strategy documented; rate limits defined
All contract tests pass; example payloads verified
No critical or high severity issues remain

overlap_resolution.api_documentation: api-designer takes priority over technical-writer for OpenAPI spec; technical-writer owns prose guides
